channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Savoring the Journey with Padma Lakshmi
item.description: The Emmy-nominated TV host dishes on the power of connection, food, fitness, and the art of finding joy.

item.title: A Practical Guide to Getting Fit in Midlife
Preventive Health Tests to Know After 50
The Smart Bird Feeders Everyone’s Talking About (and Actually Buying) (2026)
item.description: These bird feeders come with cameras and connected apps to let you see and learn about the birds in your neighborhood.

item.title: Posture Correctors That Will Straighten You Out (2026)
item.description: You’re hunched over your desk and phone for hours. I rounded up gadgets, a DIY trick, and even some yoga advice to help you straighten up.

item.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most An...

item.title: Good News in History, March 6
item.description: Happy Birthday to musician and singer-songwriter David Gilmour, who turns 80 years old. In a career spanning more than 50 years, he is best known for ...

item.title: Why Is Alexa+ So Bad?
item.description: I stuck Amazon’s Echo Show 15 and its Alexa+ AI assistant in my kitchen for a month. Things have not gone well.

item.title: 7 Laptop Docking Stations to Unlock the Full Desktop Experience (2026)
item.description: Laptop docking stations expand what your laptop can do, and I’ve been testing the best of the best to see which you should buy.

item.title: From Ukraine to Iran, Hacking Security Cameras Is Now Part of War’s ‘Playbook’
item.description: New research shows hundreds of attempts by apparent Iranian state hackers to hijack consumer-grade cameras, timed to missile and drone strikes. Israel...

item.title: ExpertFlyer unveils 330-day American systemwide upgrade availability and detailed seat maps
item.description: ExpertFlyer launches 330-day American systemwide upgrade availability and a new partnership for detailed seat maps — but membership rates are increasi...

item.title: No headphones? United passengers could be barred from flying
item.description: United Airlines now has a specific policy against listening to video or audio content without using headphones as part of an update to its official te...

item.title: The best cards for trip cancellation and interruption insurance — and what it actually covers
item.description: Select credit cards may reimburse your prepaid, nonrefundable expenses if you have to cancel or interrupt a trip for certain covered unavoidable reaso...

item.title: Earn up to 90,000 AAdvantage miles with a Citi / AAdvantage credit card
item.description: Citi's AAdvantage credit card lineup come with solid welcome bonus offers for more AA miles to use on American Airlines flights. Here's what to know.

item.title: What is Rove Miles? Everything you need to know about this new loyalty program
item.description: Rove Miles promises to bring valuable rewards to travelers who can't get a credit card — but is it worth it?

item.title: Fossil Remains of ‘Weird’ Creature with Twisted jaw and Sideways Teeth Discovered
item.description: The fossilized remains of a creature with a twisted jaw and sideways-facing teeth have been discovered in the Amazon jungle. Scientists say the plant ...

item.title: Scientists Successfully Mine Meteorites for Precious Metals on International Space Station
item.description: Last week, GNN reported that fungi were being trailed by scientists in Austria for their potential to extract valuable metals from electronic and indu...

item.title: Philly Man Uses Mobile Laundromat to Wash Homeless Residents’ Clothes
item.description: A man who felt he needed a more fulfilling line of work began a mobile laundromat surface the wash the clothes of Philadelphia’s homeless population. ...

item.title: AWS launches a new AI agent platform specifically for healthcare
item.description: AWS is launching Amazon Connect Health, an AI agent platform that will help with patient scheduling, documentation, and patient verification.

item.title: DiligenceSquared uses AI, voice agents to make M&A research affordable
item.description: Instead of relying on expensive management consultants, the startup uses AI voice agents to conduct interviews with customers of the companies the PE ...

item.title: FBI investigating hack on its wiretap and surveillance systems: Report
item.description: Hackers allegedly broke into the FBI’s networks, according to a report by CNN.

item.title: Cluely CEO Roy Lee admits to publicly lying about revenue numbers last year
item.description: The $7 million in annual recurring revenue that Cluely CEO Roy Lee shared last summer was a lie, its founder and CEO Roy Lee admitted on Thursday on X...

item.title: New Elephant Ambulance Marks Inaugural Rescue, Bringing 27-year-old to Hospital with Leg Injury
item.description: An animal conservation/welfare organization has had to think big to solve a big challenge: how to transport elephants in need of veterinary care acros...

item.title: Creamy Sausage Spaghetti
item.description: If you love a creamy pasta with big flavor, this creamy sausage spaghetti needs to be on your menu. Smoked…

item.title: Tuscan Melting Cabbage
item.description: Groceries are expensive right now, so I’ve been leaning hard on the cheap staples. This melting cabbage with a garlicky…

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #79
item.description: I planned dinner, so you don’t have to! This weekly meal plan includes easy dinners plus a free shopping list!…

item.title: One-Pan Irish Chicken
item.description: This Irish chicken is my cozy mashup of pub vibes and weeknight reality. Seared chicken thighs baked over bacon, cabbage,…

item.description: We arrived in Beijing expecting chaos: traffic, horns, overwhelming noise, the stereotypical capital rush. What we found instead was a city that felt ...

item.title: Crack Chicken Orzo

item.title: What grocery stores reveal about how people eat
item.description: A grocery store is one of the most revealing places you can walk into when travelling. More than restaurants or cafés, it shows how people actually ea...

item.title: What is considered a “normal meal” in different cultures

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
